summary: Verified expense-to-loan settlement bug fix. All 10 tests passed. The fix correctly excludes expenses with converted_to_loan=True from vendor settlement balance calculations across all 3 endpoints.
passed_tests: Verified 4 expenses with converted_to_loan=True exist in database
Reference expense ie_c7d3911d21af found with converted_to_loan=True
GET /api/vendors - Excludes converted expenses from settlement (vendor_93b09b82f3f5 shows $0)
GET /api/vendors/{vendor_id} - Excludes converted expenses from settlement balance
GET /api/vendor/me - Vendor portal excludes converted expenses from settlement display
Regular completed expenses (not converted) are correctly included in settlement
Converted expenses have correct status='converted_to_loan' and converted_to_loan=True flag
Settlement calculation is consistent across all 3 endpoints

converted_expenses: ie_c7d3911d21af (vendor_93b09b82f3f5 - abshar test) - Amount: 100 INR -> loan_b78697f56123
test_vendors: vendor_63c9c4fb27d8 (kenway) - 2 converted expenses + transactions, converted excluded

context_for_next_testing_agent: Expense-to-loan settlement fix verified. The converted_to_loan exclusion is working correctly in all 3 settlement pipeline locations: /api/vendors (line 3737), /api/vendors/{id} (line 3902), /api/vendor/me (line 4176). Test file test_expense_to_loan_settlement.py can be used for regression testing.

bug_fix_verification.bug_description: When an approved expense was converted to a loan, the amount was incorrectly debited to the vendor's settlement balance
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Added 'converted_to_loan': {'$ne': True} filter to settlement aggregation pipelines
bug_fix_verification.verification_result: PASS - Converted expenses are now correctly excluded from settlement calculations
